text: The new update completely fixed the bug I was struggling with. Fantastic work!
It works, I guess. Nothing special, but it gets the job done.
I waited two hours on hold and still nobody could help me. Incredibly frustrating.
Shipping was on time and the packaging was reasonable.
Absolutely love the design — it feels thoughtful and polished.
The interface is confusing and I keep getting lost in the menus.
A solid, dependable tool. I use it every day without complaints.
Honestly the worst experience I've had with any product this year.
